message:
fix: correct GC pause histogram bucket bounds and component shape purity threshold

Two independent bug fixes:

1. gc_pause: when all recorded pauses have the same duration, the
   histogram bucket count could exceed the actual range width, producing
   buckets with inverted bounds (lower > upper). Clamp bucket_count to
   at most the representable range width so every bucket's
   lower_bound_ns <= upper_bound_ns. Add unit and integration tests.

2. component_shape_catalog: correct the context-dependency purity
   classification boundary. A weight equal to max_conditional_severity
   is now ConditionallyPure (strict > comparison) rather than Impure
   (previously >= comparison). Move LoweredPropValue import to the test
   module. Apply rustfmt-compatible line wrapping to long method chains.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
